headline: Goldman Sachs Lifts PT on Phillips 66 (PSX) to $186 From $168 – Here’s Why
summary: Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) is one of the most undervalued energy stocks to buy now. On March 12, Goldman Sachs lifted the price target on Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) to $186 from $168 and maintained a Neutral rating on the shares. The firm told investors in a research note that estimates across the U.S. Majors and Canadian […]

headline: Price caps, taking the stairs, and short-sleeved shirts: How countries are coping with the Iran war energy shock
summary: Some countries have imposed price caps and released oil stockpiles to maintain energy supplies, while others are trying to reduce consumption.
